introduction: I am a developer, Middle Office financial analyst and cross-sector technology professional with many years of experience spanning investment management, pharmaceutical support, e-invoicing, healthcare applications, automotive engineering environments, postal services and personal e-commerce delivery.
evidence: My strongest pattern is connecting financial detail with practical technology. I combine software development, SQL investigation, Python automation, AI-assisted coding, investment operations, pricing and valuation awareness, and clear stakeholder communication to turn complex workflows into reliable results.

highlights.text: Master's Degree in E-Management, graduated with Honours and full academic excellence
Middle Office financial analysis across NAV, P&L, pricing, reconciliations and instrument lifecycle workflows
Daily AI tools and coding-agent workflows for development, analysis and delivery
Market knowledge across stocks, crypto, derivatives and financial-instrument pricing

focusAreas.title: Developer Mindset
focusAreas.description: I work like a modern developer: using AI agents, structured analysis, code, tests and documentation to move faster while keeping the work understandable, maintainable and useful.
bullets: AI-assisted coding, review, documentation and refactoring workflows
Python, SQL and practical automation for business and finance problems

focusAreas.title: Investment Middle Office
focusAreas.description: My Man Group experience sits at the intersection of investment operations, data quality and technology within one of the world's largest listed hedge fund managers and global alternative investment firms. I bring Middle Office fluency around NAV, P&L, pricing governance, reconciliations, trade lifecycle data, risk controls and coordination with Operations, Tech and investment stakeholders.
bullets: Middle Office exposure across NAV, P&L, pricing, valuation, reconciliations and portfolio operations
Financial-instrument knowledge across equities, crypto, derivatives, OTC products and systematic trading concepts

focusAreas.title: Data And Automation
focusAreas.description: I use SQL, Python, scripting, AI-assisted analysis and reporting habits to investigate data breaks, validate financial workflows, automate checks and create better operational visibility.
bullets: SQL investigation, reconciliation, pricing and validation checks
Python automation, monitoring and reporting improvements

focusAreas.title: Builder Mindset
focusAreas.description: Neutron.bg is my live Django e-commerce project: a working product where I own the catalog, checkout, order lifecycle, admin workflows and hosting/deployment thinking behind a real web storefront.
bullets: Live Django 5.1 e-commerce application at neutron.bg
Checkout, order lifecycle and supplier workflow design
